authors: Vilde Schanke Sundet Department of Journalism and Media Studies
raw_title: Conceptualising Youth Media Strategies: Balancing Platforms, Profiles, and People
title_en: Conceptualising Youth Media Strategies: Balancing Platforms, Profiles, and People
title_zh: 概念化青年媒体策略：平衡平台、个人资料与人际关系
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨年轻人如何制定媒体使用策略，平衡不同平台、个人在线形象和真实人际关系之间的关系。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how young people develop media strategies to balance different platforms, online profiles, and real-life relationships.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代青年媒体消费与身份建构的策略性行为
research_direction_en: Research on strategic behaviors in youth media consumption and identity construction in the digital age
